name: floating-clock
description: Always-on-top floating desktop clock for macOS — multi-file Objective-C NSPanel with three-segment dashboard (LOCAL · ACTIVE MARKETS · NEXT TO OPEN). 7 bundled profiles (Default / Day Trader / Night Owl / Minimalist / Researcher / Watch Party / Auction Watcher) + 13 Quick Style moods (Brutalist / Zen / Retro CRT / Executive / Neon / Hacker / Glacier / Midnight / Featherlight / Industrial / Trading Floor / Scholar / Samba). 14 major exchanges (NYSE · TSX · B3 · LSE · Euronext · XETRA · SIX · JSE · TSE · HKEX · SSE · KRX · NSE · ASX) covering all populated continents, grouped by region (Americas / Europe / Africa / Asia / Oceania) via iana-prefix detection. Live 5-state session tracking (OPEN · LUNCH · PRE-MARKET · AFTER-HOURS · CLOSED) — amber ◐ dawn + rose ◒ dusk auction signals, gated by SessionSignalWindow (off / 5-60 min, Quick-Style-composable). Rocket-launch T-HH:MM:SS countdown (progressive to T-Nd Hh MMm at ≥24h). Urgency-tiered green/amber/red. Tabulated sections with frosted-glass. Clipboard snapshots with self-documenting UTC-stamped headers via per-segment Copy actions. /floating-clock:diagnose slash command for health reports. Reveal App in Finder + Copy Time/Active/Next menu utilities. Aesthetic surface: 28 color themes · 12 progress-bar glyphs · 8 corner styles · 7 shadow presets · 7 segment-gap presets · 7 font weights (thin → black) · 7 letter-spacing values · 7 line-spacing values · 7 time-separator glyphs · 6 density profiles · 5-phase sun/moon glyph · global + per-segment FontWeight/Transparency · 9 DateFormat locales. **v1.13 headline: imminence-aware countdown gradient + NEXT row redesign + sub-element tooltips**. Both ACTIVE (time-to-close) and NEXT (time-to-open) countdown text + ACTIVE progress-bar leading edge now interpolate green→amber→orange→red on a Weber-Fechner log scale (equal log-secs intervals = equal perceptual jumps; pattern from sensory-perception physics) using HSB hue rotation 120°→0° (heat-map / traffic-light convention used by Grafana / Datadog / Apple Health). Below 30s the text + bar pulse 1Hz (cursor-blink convention; reuses existing per-second tick — no sub-second timer added). All 8 numeric constants live as `extern const` in `Sources/content/UrgencyColors.h` (single source of truth — tweak any one and ACTIVE + NEXT update simultaneously). NEXT row redesigned: market time + tz move to line 1 next to flag/code (`🇯🇵 TSE  Mon 09:00 JST`); line 2 carries your local + duration + countdown (`└─ Sun 17:00 · 6.5 hr  T-2d 1h 31m 39s`). Duration column switched to decimal-hour format `6.5 hr` / `6.0 hr` (uniform widths) with user-chosen 'duration' label. Leading session-state glyph removed (flag emoji acts as bullet). Every countdown now visibly ticks seconds at every scale: `formatCountdown` adds seconds to <60m + <100h cases; `formatCountdownFancy` adds seconds to ≥1d case (T-Nd Hh MMm SSs). Sub-element naming registry begins: `[TIME]` NSToolTip on LocalSegmentView.timeLabel surfaces controlling prefs on hover. Continues v1.12's UI-naming + auto-sizing campaign — bar leading edge + countdown text now share color phase via single `FCUrgencyAlertColor` call. 85 fixtures total (15 holiday, 5 half-day, 1 urgency-continuous + 1 legacy step). Sub-0.1% idle CPU, ~224 KB signed binary.
